summary: Sourcey-generated API reference documentation for labstack/echo, a high-performance Go web framework

observations.sourcey_command: sourcey godoc -m . -o godoc.json && sourcey build -o dist
observations.coverage_notes: All exported types, functions, interfaces, and methods documented. Includes Echo struct, Context interface, middleware functions, routing, and testing utilities.
observations.sourcey_config: sourcey.config.ts using godoc adapter with snapshot mode
